title: Chapter 40
content:
Chapter 40

"Haa... Haa..."

We took deep, heavy breaths as we both tried to calm down after that extensive exercise. Well, I was the only one moving, but I doubt it was any less taxing on Rayla.

Her head was down, and while she was still in the same position, as soon as I let go of her leg, she completely fell on her side, limp as last time, but not unconscious.

I retracted my dick that was under heavy pressure from her tight squeezing pussy and the weight of her thighs. As it came out, there was still about a minute left before the time was up, so I began to stroke it. It was slick with her juices, and mine as well, unfortunately, but that didn't matter when there was such an exquisite sight in front of me.

I stood up and arrived before Rayla before grabbed her golden locks, and turned her head to me. Her head turned to me and her eyes were met with my dick, going wide even though the haze in them suggested she was completely spent.

"Don't bite it, mother." Before she could say anything though, I shoved my dick in her mouth but unfortunately couldn't go far without the presence of mana to assist loosening her throat so I had to make so with her mouth only. I was close to cumming anyway so there wasn't a need to go into such detail, "Close your mouth, mother."

Rayla did as I asked on instinct and clamped her lips down on my dick, and applied suction on her own so tight that I couldn't even understand what had happened so fast and just erupted in her mouth.

"Argh!"

With a groan, I began to empty myself in her mouth. I forgot to tell her that she had to swallow it and since her knowledge of what comes out of a penis was limited to urine, she must have thought I was letting out the same thing as she almost chocked on it.

She swallowed some while some leaked out of her lips from the sides. But it was still a giant load, and I went on until the time was up. Once again, it wasn't a good feeling, everything ending just like that, but what could be done about it?

Done, spent, and my dick returned to its usual depressing sight, I was already out of her mouth so I stepped back.

Cough!

Cough!

Cough!

Rayla began to cough, trying to push whatever was in her mouth out of it but she must have halfway realized it wasn't piss as she stopped pushing it out and gave it a taste curiously.

"Wh-What is this?" She asked after some time of rest. I didn't intend to have this conversation with her yet but since she had already seen me fucking her with my dick, there was no need to hold back on my lust and that was the second point I shouldn't have done.

"I-It's something that comes out of my penis, mother. It's not urine." I immediately replied.

She must have felt the effects of my semen due to her high sensitivity with mana as a mage. She could tell the advantages of my semen better than Sandra.

She looked at me with an inquisitive gaze, her chest covered in her shirt, but her waist exposed as her legs were closed, only to push the milky white skin out more. Her chin and collarbone were covered in my spunk. After a few moments, she asked, "What is that, Jack? What happened to you penis?"

"I don't know, mother. It happened after I awakened." I replied. I kept the explanation short and the same one I gave Sandra, since both of them would know it one day.

"..." She looked at me for a while silently before she sighed and opened her mouth, "Don't tell anyone about this, Jack. Do you understand? Not even your brother or sisters or your father. We will deal with this tomorrow."

I nodded and stood up to leave before I suddenly remembered something.

I turned to Rayla and said, "Be prepared to leave tomorrow, mother."

"Leave where?" Rayla asked.

"To the forest," I replied with a smile and left her room without giving her a chance to ask for an explanation.

There was indeed a lot to do.

~~

The next day, I went to the lord's district with Julian, where training began. They essentially taught us how to channel mana, which they did on the first day. After about an hour, they left us to our own devices just like that day.

The requirement was to spar with an instructor or a goblin-level monster, and if they said you were okay, then you were a-okay. With that intention in mind, and already having everything prepared back at home, I approached my aunt, who was an instructor in the lord's mansion.

"Hmm? What did you say, Jack?" My aunt asked.

"I said I want to spar." I simply replied.

"..." She looked at me with a weird gaze, but in the end, sighed and said, "It's your right, Jack. But are you sure? You could get hurt even if it is a spar."

"I know and I understand the risks," I replied. My aunt, from the looks of it, was a peak second-star aura master. I was just a beginner, one star in that sense.

Although mana circles were superior to aura, there was a reason why aura was more prominent than mana. It's because it was easier to master, and sensing it was a lot easier than mana, so many preferred aura over mana. Aura not only granted tough defense, but it also granted short bursts of power in which an attack could attain a hundred percent attack increase, or in some cases, even beyond that.

My aunt looked at me and nodded after a while. She and I both arrived at the stage where the performance before the lord was held under the watch of two more instructors. They had to be present to make sure I wasn't given an unfair or favorable verdict.

My aunt readied her wooden sword while I raised my staff before me. A staff wasn't a weapon, but it could be used as a distraction during close fights, and no doubt, my aunt would try to close the distance.

As expected, as soon as the fight started, my aunt kept her aura limited to one star and jumped at me, trying to close the distance. Since the aim wasn't to hurt her, I decided to end this quickly.

Just as she was close, I swirled the magical staff in my hand and poked it at her. That's right, poked her. But at fast speed, that poke was deadly, at least to her stomach, and she realized that and stopped midway, coming to a break just before I shoved a fireball in her face.

It was still in my hand, but she could definitely feel the heat coming from it. Her eyes widened, and she couldn't help but gulp. She looked at me and then looked down at the fireball again before she straightened her posture. She nodded and said, "You have an excellent battle sense, Jack."

The other two instructors couldn't help but agree as well, as they nodded with her statement. After all, most fighters, even experienced ones, would have either tried to defend or move out of the way, opting for a counterattack. But I used her speed against her, and the fact that this was a spar and not a real battle, I knew she would stop rather than continue.

Had it been a real battle, my moves would have been much more deadly.

"Come with me now. I will have your license upgraded so you can use more of the town's facilities and venture out into the forest." My aunt said and took me under the unanimous agreement of the other two instructors.

"Have you thought about the lord's proposal yet? I believe your life would be turned around if you did." My aunt replied.

"If you do meet lord, please tell him that I shall return on the day agreed upon and give my answer," I replied. Since the last time, there had been a change in plans. Now I had a different method in mind.

Internal breakdown.

Well, the details would have to be discussed later, as I was rather busy at the moment. There was not much time, and I had to leave before the lord changed his mind and demanded an answer right now, since the talent I had shown was enough to make him alter the decisions he had made before almost the entire town.

My license was upgraded, and Julian was surprised to see me done so soon. I didn't need to bring him with me, but I brought him in case he needed to persuade my aunt. After that, as soon as we arrived at home, everyone was ready.

They were still uncertain about this, but I urged them to have faith in me, which, majority of them did, and so all of them agreed to follow me.

"What's this, Julian? Is the whole family going out to hunt?" The guards at the walls were surprised. Julian could only awkwardly chuckle before he gave a bogus reason while handing six bronze coins.

With that, we were out.

Now, for a month, let's go camping.
